name: platform-architect
description: Backend systems architecture across Continuum and Encore for Groupon. Service decomposition, API contracts, data ownership, event-driven patterns, Continuum-to-Encore migration strategy. NOT for consumer frontend (use /mbnxt-architect), data pipelines (use /data-architect), merchant CRM (use /b2b-architect), or cross-platform strategy (use /enterprise-architect).
